seasonTagline: You radiate warmth and depth, thriving in rich, earthy tones that echo the abundance of the autumn landscape.
skinDescription: Your skin has a warm, golden-olive undertone and is of medium to deep depth.
hairDescription: Your hair is a deep, rich dark brown with warm undertones.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a deep, warm brown with subtle golden flecks that add depth.
seasonStory: Your natural coloring is characterized by warmth and depth, with a medium to deep skin tone and rich, dark hair and eyes. You possess a beautiful blend of warmth and intensity that allows you to wear colors with significant depth and richness.

bestColors.name: Deep Olive Green
bestColors.reason: This deep, muted green harmonizes beautifully with your warm undertones and adds depth.

bestColors.name: Terracotta
bestColors.reason: A rich, earthy red with warm undertones that brings out the warmth in your skin.

bestColors.name: Warm Mustard Yellow
bestColors.reason: This deep, muted yellow is vibrant yet earthy, complementing your warm coloring.

bestColors.name: Deep Teal
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated blend of blue and green with a warm depth that enhances your features.

bestColors.name: Rich Brown
bestColors.reason: This classic, warm brown shade echoes your natural hair color and skin undertones.

bestColors.name: Warm Plum
bestColors.reason: A deep, warm purple that adds richness and sophistication without cooling your complexion.

bestColors.name: Burnt Orange
bestColors.reason: A fiery, earthy orange that complements your warm skin tone perfectly.

bestColors.name: Espresso
bestColors.reason: A deep, dark neutral that provides a strong foundation and works as a sophisticated alternative to black.

bestColors.name: Muted Coral
bestColors.reason: A softer, earthier version of coral that brings warmth and life to your complexion.

bestColors.name: Golden Khaki
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated neutral with warm undertones that is both grounding and elegant.

bestColors.name: Deep Burgundy
bestColors.reason: A luxurious, deep red with warm undertones that adds intensity and richness.

bestColors.name: Warm Sage Green
bestColors.reason: A softer, muted green that is subtle yet complements your natural warmth.

avoidColors.name: Bright White
avoidColors.reason: This stark, cool color washes out your warm skin tone and creates too harsh a contrast.

avoidColors.name: Electric Blue
avoidColors.reason: This overly bright and cool color clashes with your warm, earthy coloring.

avoidColors.name: Pastel Pink
avoidColors.reason: Too light and cool for your deep, warm coloring; it appears washed out.

foundation.tip: Look for foundations with warm or olive undertones that match your skin depth.

celebrities.name: Shakira
celebrities.reason: She shares your deep autumn coloring with warm, golden-olive skin, dark hair, and deep brown eyes.

celebrities.name: Selena Gomez
celebrities.reason: Her natural coloring, particularly her skin undertone and hair depth, aligns well with the deep autumn palette.

celebrities.name: Jessica Alba
celebrities.reason: She exhibits similar warm, deep undertones in her skin, hair, and eyes, benefiting from rich, earthy colors.

celebrities.name: Priyanka Chopra
celebrities.reason: Her striking deep autumn features, including warm skin and dark hair, are beautifully complemented by the season's color palette.
